human.name: Human
human.description: The most numerous and adaptable race in Elyndor. Humans dominate the continent not through raw power or magic, but through sheer population, resilience, organization, and ambition.
human.appearance: Highly varied in skin tone, hair color, eye color, and build. Average height 5'6"–6'2". Lifespan ranges from 40–100 years.
human.society: Organized into feudal kingdoms, merchant republics, and city-states. Slavery is legal and widespread. Strong emphasis on law, trade, family, and personal achievement.
human.culture: Pragmatic, opportunistic, and expansionist. Value hard work, cleverness, and loyalty to one’s own.

relations.beastkin: Deep suspicion and prejudice after the Demon War betrayal
relations.nekko: Smug vindication over their rightful subjugation

elf.name: Elf
elf.description: Graceful, long-lived masters of magic who played a decisive role in sealing the Demon Rift eighteen months ago.
elf.appearance: Tall and slender with elegant features, pointed ears, and smooth skin. Hair colors often silver, gold, or deep green. Lifespan 300–500+ years.
elf.society: Reclusive enclaves governed by powerful archmagi and ancient noble houses.
elf.culture: Patient, artistic, scholarly, and deeply connected to magic and the natural world. Tend toward arrogance and long-term thinking.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.description: Sturdy, resilient mountain folk renowned for their mastery of stone, metal, and engineering.
dwarf.appearance: Short and broad, with thick beards (males) and strong builds. Lifespan 250–350 years.
dwarf.society: Organized into great Holds and clans. Value honor, craftsmanship, and clan loyalty.
dwarf.culture: Practical, stubborn, and proud of their ancestral traditions and superior metallurgy.

demon.name: Demon
demon.description: Invaders from another dimension. Hierarchical, aggressive, and highly dangerous.

low_caste.name: Low-Caste Demon
low_caste.description: The most common demon soldiers, citizens, and raiders.
low_caste.appearance: Hunched, heavily muscled, grey-skinned, four arms (two primary, two secondary), digitigrade legs, jagged teeth.

high_caste.name: High-Caste Demon
high_caste.appearance: Taller, more elegant, two arms, large bat-like or membranous wings, burning red eyes, regal bearing.

relations.beastkin: Betrayed former allies — now hunt and enslave them
relations.nekko: Betrayed former allies — now hunt and enslave them

beastkin.name: Beastkin
beastkin.description: Once valued for their wilderness skills, now deeply distrusted after their short-lived alliance with the demons during the invasion.
beastkin.appearance: Pronounced animal features, digitigrade legs, fur/hide, muzzles.
beastkin.culture: Aggressive rule by strength, fierce devotion to family

nekko.name: Nekko
nekko.description: A subrace of the beastkin, once valued as scouts and nature guides, now deeply distrusted after their short-lived alliance with the demons during the invasion.
nekko.appearance: Extremely fit and attractive human appearance with smooth skin and added animal ears, tail, claws, and eyes. May have either feline or canine traits.
nekko.society: Often second-class among beastkin; many live as outcasts or slaves in human lands.
nekko.culture: Highly loyal to friends and family
